title: Asterisk Active Channel Saturation vs Licensed Session Ceiling
dataSources: `index=voip` `sourcetype=asterisk:ami` `Event=CoreShowChannelsComplete` snapshots or scripted `asterisk -rx "core show channels count"` metrics
app: AMI polling script + Universal Forwarder, optional SNMP if exported
spl:
index=voip sourcetype=asterisk:ami Event="CoreShowChannelsComplete"
| lookup asterisk_license_limits host OUTPUT session_license_limit AS license_ceiling
| eval active=tonumber(ListItems), license_ceiling=tonumber(license_ceiling)
| eval util_pct=round(100*active/nullif(license_ceiling,0),2)
| where util_pct > 85
| table _time, host, active, license_ceiling, util_pct
| sort - util_pct
description: When concurrent channels approach licensed or CPU limits, new calls receive congestion tones even though individual trunks look healthy. Ingesting periodic AMI channel inventory provides a leading indicator before busy-hour meltdown.
value: Protects revenue and emergency call completion by triggering capacity augments or rerouting before hard blocking begins.
implementation: Poll AMI `Action: CoreShowChannels` and capture `ListItems` from the completing event, or run CLI `core show channels` every minute via scripted input emitting `active_channels`. Maintain a lookup `session_license_limit` per `host` (commercial Asterisk or appliance cap). Alert above 85% utilization for 10 minutes. Cross-check CPU from OS metrics.
visualization: Gauge (util_pct), Line chart (active vs ceiling), Table (forecasted exhaust).
knownFalsePositives: Channel peaks during marketing or emergency public-service announcements, holiday peaks, or absorbed traffic from a node in maintenance the capacity plan allowed.

references.title: Splunk Docs: Run shell scripts as scripted inputs

detailedImplementation:

Step 2 â€” Validate AMI parsing against `asterisk -rx` manual count.

Step 3 â€” Seasonal busy-hour overlay on dashboard.

Step 4 â€” Escalation runbook to add SIP trunks or VMs.
grandmaExplanation: We watch live voice channels against license limits. We help you catch saturation before new calls fail outright.
telcoUseCase: Trunk sizing for service providers â€” compare live channel usage from AMI `CoreShowChannels` snapshots to commercial license limits or engineered busy hour.
